The TalkBack focus ring remained on the search input field, which effectively means it maintained focus while its content changed.
The label of the first search suggestion list item changed from 'Search for 'go' in mail' to 'Search for 'goo' in mail'.
The search suggestion list item labeled 'going' disappeared.
A new search suggestion list item labeled 'good' appeared in the search suggestions list.
The email list item for 'Venmo' disappeared from the second position.

A new email list item for 'Lenny's Newsletter' appeared in the second position with an 'L' in a circle icon, subject 'launched at Google I/O 2026', body 'Your weekly listens from How I AI, pa...', and date 'May 24'. This replaces the 'Venmo' item.
The partially visible email list item for 'Lenny's Newsletter' (with a generic person icon and 'May 25' date) disappeared from its previous position as the third item.
A new partially visible email list item for 'Hetty Lui McKinnon from To Vege...' appeared in the third position with a generic person icon and date 'May 24'.
The email results list content shifted upwards, making the new 'Lenny's Newsletter' item fully visible and revealing the new 'Hetty Lui McKinnon from To Vege...' item as partially visible.
The selected keyboard suggestion tab changed its label from 'go' to 'goo'.
The keyboard suggestion tab 'good' shifted position from second to first after the selected chip, indicating a reordering of suggestions.
The keyboard suggestion tab labeled 'got' disappeared.
A new keyboard suggestion tab labeled 'goodnight' appeared in the third position.

The search input field, filter buttons ('Labels', 'From', 'To', 'Attachment'), search suggestions ('Search for "google" in mail', 'google', 'google's'), 'Quick Results' heading, the email list items (except the one opened), and the chip-like buttons ('google', 'Google', 'googled', microphone icon) disappeared from the screen.
The soft keyboard disappeared from the bottom of the screen.

New elements related to the email view appeared: the email's subject ('Security alert'), folder ('Inbox'), action bar icons (Archive/Unread, Delete, Email, More options), email header details (sender icon, sender name, time, reply icon, more options icon, recipient dropdown), the Google logo, 'A new sign-in on Android' heading, profile icon, email address, email body text, 'Check activity' button, 'You can also see security activity at' text and a link to myaccount.google.com/notifications, and footer text (email purpose, copyright/address).

The floating 'M' logo with an overlapping square icon shifted its vertical position to accommodate the new chat bubble icon above it.
